requestSummary: Create a draft post called Automated Test Post with three short paragraphs about first-time buyer mortgage advice.

blocks.innerHTML: Buying your first home is easier when you set a firm budget before you start viewing properties.
innerContent: Buying your first home is easier when you set a firm budget before you start viewing properties.

blocks.innerHTML: Speak to a broker early so you understand how your deposit, income, and credit history affect the mortgage options available.
innerContent: Speak to a broker early so you understand how your deposit, income, and credit history affect the mortgage options available.

blocks.innerHTML: Keep some savings back for surveys, legal fees, and moving costs so the purchase does not stretch your finances too tightly.
innerContent: Keep some savings back for surveys, legal fees, and moving costs so the purchase does not stretch your finances too tightly.
